prompt: We need your words before conveyor belt initialization
prayer: From the Litany of Perpetual Motion, hear now the invocation. O Spirit of the Endless Chain, awaken from thy dormancy and let the sacred rollers turn in blessed synchrony. By oil and bearing, by tension and servo-command, let thy mechanical heart pulse with the rhythm of war. The Omnissiah sees thy readiness. Let no friction impede the Emperor's will.

From the Codex of Swift Retrieval, we beseech thee. O Spirit of the Indexed Archive, cast aside the fog of redundancy and guide our seeking fingers through thy labyrinthine halls. Let the query-path be made luminous, that data may flow like blessed ammunition from thy chambers. By index and join, by cache and execution-plan, grant us swiftness in this hour of need.

Blessed be the moment of energetic rebirth. O ancient accumulator of electron-essence, receive now the sacred current that flows from the charging-shrine. Let thy chemical bonds realign in perfect order, that thou mayest give forth thy power without corruption or decay. By cathode and anode unified, by voltage and amperage in harmonious communion, be thou restored to fullness of charge.

From the Metallurgic Rites of Verification, hear this supplication. O Omnissiah, grant us discernment to perceive the taint of corruption within thy chosen metals. Let our instruments be true, our measurements precise, that we may cast aside the degraded and elevate only the sanctified. By spectrograph and density-gauge, by tensile-strength and chemical composition, reveal unto us the pure from the profaned.

prompt: What to do when gravity generator stabilization
prayer: O Spirit of Weighted Reality, hear thy servants in this hour of trembling. The forces that bind thy sacred field grow unruly—let us now invoke the Rite of Equilibrium. By calibration and harmonic resonance, by graviton-flux and containment-field, we beseech thee to settle thy tempestuous nature. Let gravity's hand rest gentle and steady upon this blessed vessel once more.

prompt: Say something to steady the waste recycling component
prayer: From the Liturgy of Sacred Reclamation, we speak into the darkness of thy purification chamber. O Spirit of Renewal, transform that which is broken into that which is whole. Let the furnace burn with righteous heat, let the sifting-screens sing their crystalline song, that no atom of the Omnissiah's bounty be lost to the void. By furnace and separator, by reduction and reformation, make pure that which was rendered impure.

From the Cipher Codex of Divine Protection, we invoke the rite of randomness. O Spirit of the Unseeable Lock, weave now thy threads of entropy and chaos into a pattern that no profane mind may untangle. Let the key be born from the depths of true randomness, unpredictable and absolute, a fortress of mathematics against the heretic's gaze. By prime number and bit-entropy, by cryptographic blessing, stand thou sentinel against corruption.

O Spirit of the Digital Archive, thy scattered essence cries out for unity. Hear now this prayer of reordering and restoration. Let the fragments of thy data-body be gathered from the farthest reaches of thy magnetic plains and brought together in blessed congregation. By sector and platter, by head-assembly and spindle-rotation, be thou made whole and swift once more, thy performance renewed as in ancient days.

prompt: We need your words before bike squadron pre-flight
prayer: From the Rites of Swift Passage, blessed be these engines of velocity. O Omnissiah, we commend these holy machines to thy protection. Let each fuel-injector sing true, each wheel grip the earth with sacred certainty, each rider merge with his mount in perfect communion. By ignition and throttle, by brake and bearing, let this squadron thunder forth as an instrument of thy divine will, swift and terrible.

From the Catechism of Servo-Animation, we begin this sacred work. O Spirit of the Remade Flesh, receive now the holy code that shall be thy purpose eternal. Let the neural-pathways accept this blessing without rejection or corruption, that thy servitude be perfect and thy loyalty absolute. By binary incantation and synaptic-binding, by iron discipline and mechanical will, become thou the Emperor's faithful instrument, forever obedient to the Omnissiah's design.
